programme.title: Savage Guns
programme.desc: In Sonora in a lonesome valley near the border of Arizona ex-major Summer tries to forget about the horrors of the war of independence on his farm He has foresworn to violence His intention is put to the test when a gang of villains ravages the small town

programme.title: Corvette Summer
programme.desc: High school graduate Kenneth W Dantley Junior and Vanessa a hooker-in-training try to track down his custom-made newly-stolen Corvette

programme.title: Shane
programme.desc: The story revolves around Shane a bounty hunter who helps a family of farmers being harassed by the local goons

programme.title: Public Cowboy Number 1
programme.desc: Rustlers using modern technology airplanes shortwave radios refrigerated trucks are Genes target

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain challenges the N-Team to an athletic competition on Mount Icarus thus distracting them from stopping her from finding the Three Sacred Treasures

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby suspects that MAD have stolen the national treasure of Ireland the Blarney Stone and sends Gadget to retrieve it

programme.title: The Great Grape Ape
programme.desc: A film director decides to replace his mechanical star with a real oversized ape and turns to Grape Ape in Movie Madness The Grape Ape and Beegle fight bad guys in the old west in Trouble At Bad Rock

programme.title: Hair Bear Bunch
programme.desc: Hair Bear Bunch

programme.title: Hong 110

programme.title: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: Rocky Bullwinkle Jet Fuel Part 31 Fractured Fairy Tales The Elves and the Shoemaker Dudley Do-Right Story 3 Rocky Bullwinkle Jet Fuel Part 32

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: Rocky Bullwinkle Jet Fuel Part 33 Fractured Fairy Tales Sleeping Beauty Peabodys Improbably History William Tecumseh Sherman Rocky Bullwinkle Jet Fuel Part 34

programme.title: The Long Shadow
programme.desc: Sun Hill is forced to accept the legacy of DS Beech and Meadows discovers that he is not the only one with a questionable past

programme.title: USS Constitution
programme.desc: A technical marvel of her time Constitution gave our young republic its first victories at sea and began a tradition of excellence for the US Navy Now restored to her original splendour the Constitution is now the oldest commissioned vessel in the US NavyRelive the legend and watch this famous ship as she reaffirms Americas dreams as her crew sails into the twenty-first century

programme.title: The Falklands War
programme.desc: This landmark documentary was produced 5 years after the end of The Falklands War and features interviews and insights from both the Argentinian and British sides

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Reverend Nolan Powers is a fire and brimstone evangelist who has achieved tremendous fame wealth and power from his radio program thats broadcast on a national basis from his station WGOD A team of TV journalists do a story on Powers and his increasing popularity with the masses However a long-suppressed shameful secret from his dark family past threatens to destroy Powers and his current high profile status

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: On Halloween Eric sees the pentagram appear on his hand and knows his transformation into a werewolf is imminent He locks himself in an abandoned house not realizing that a disfigured recluse still lives there

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: A rancher comes after Eric when he befriends a she-wolf who earlier had attacked the rancher for killing her wolf pups

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick comes face to face with the vampire LaCroix and kills him But the serial murders continue and get personal when it is discovered that one of the victims was a friend of Nicks

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki and Ryan investigate the murder of a gym owner and realize that a mysterious pair of boxing gloves may be to blame

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A high school track star haunted by the recent death of her Olympic-medalist mother is given her mothers magic crystal amulet which brings to life her secret ambitions and extracts vengeance upon those who cause her pain

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: After the death penalty is abolished an executioner continues his former job through freelancing

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A greedy woman makes the mistake of murdering her husband while an escaped mental patient dressed in a Santa Claus outfit is on the loose

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Down on his luck yuppie Richard Shepard crashes at his buddy Carls swanky seaside abode after he gets thrown out of his home by his fed-up wife Eleanor Richard develops a strong bond with a mysterious large white dog who not only becomes his new best friend but also kills anyone who angers Richard

programme.title: Smart 504
programme.desc: Smart 504

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: A team has made a super computer police car that can tell everything wrong with vehicles generating huge for police depts FBI etc They target and harass BJ McKay and others to put them out of business BJ and his friends decide to fight back against this car that seems to know their every step

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: After Ed starts giving Wilbur nothing but winning picks at the race track everyone wants to get in on the gravy train - including Carol and Kays milk fund for the school kids

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Ed writes and sings a song that is destined to become a hit record Of course Wilbur must pretend that its all him and not Ed

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan concocts a Kommandant of the Year award to distract Klink so a new Nazi rocket being stored protectively at Stalag 13 can be sabotaged

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan must reverse course when efforts to make Klink look competent before the Nazi Inspector General get the Kommandant promoted with a transfer to Berlin

programme.title: Mchale 321
programme.desc: Mchale 321

programme.title: Mchale 230
programme.desc: Mchale 230

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer accompanies his friend Frankie to his home for the weekend While there Gomer sings a love song to Frankies sister who is engaged to a local fellow who is not in a rush to get married Frankie and his mother use this as an opportunity to move the fellow to the altar

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Pyle wants Sgt Carter to meet his cousin Bridey at the Camp Dance Carter declines until he and Cpl Boyle spot Pyle out with a very attractive girl They assume erroneously that the girl is Pyles cousin After that is explained there is another case of mistaken identity that keep Carter and Boyle busy

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The professor makes a dye marker to help get rescued The Skipper plans to join the Navy when they get home but he finds out he must lose weight to meet their requirements--and Gilligan finds out that he must gain weight too

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways discover that a celebrated eccentric artist is on the island and they try to trick him into wanting to return to civilization so that they can use his transmitter

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: When Grandpa injures his arm he sorely regrets that he stubbornly and secretly refused to join the rest of the family in taking out a group health insurance policy offered by the Grange

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: When Grandpa and George MacMichael realize that their house painting contracts with the Sparkle Paint Company are a fraud they utilize a ruse to try to recover their money

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: Shamus
programme.desc: Millions in diamonds are stolen from a safe in NYC and later the burglar is killed Shamus is paid 10000 by the owner to find the diamonds or killer

programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Love Boat 121
programme.desc: Love Boat 121

programme.title: WKRP 205
programme.desc: WKRP 205

programme.title: WKRP 109
programme.desc: WKRP 109

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Margaret admits to being unfaithful to Herman while she was on vacation in Greece--and finds she has plenty of company

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Emily is afraid of the costumes on Halloween and Taylor faces a crisis of confidence as an actor

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Joe Penny June Lockhart and Don Stroud Regarding a vendetta Dan is addicted to angel dust and heroin planted in Dans morning health drink He is then held captive Lt Nelson Bea and Binzer are franticly looking for him

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: The Harts want to give their charity committee gourmet chocolate hearts as a thank-you but when one turns out to have been part of a smuggling operation can Jonathan and Jennifer figure out what is going on before someone tries the special chocolates from an unknown admirer

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Dick inadvertently drives Tim Conway away from his regular poker game

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: A shuttle crashes on a beach after being pursued by a second Taelon piloted shuttle When Liam locates the survivor a Taelon called Belleye he claims to want to help the Resistance take back Earth from the Taelons

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The team is sent to Grovers Mill when it is discovered the 1938 radio broadcast of invasion was real They meet with a group of local men who successfully fought the Martians 50 years ago and believe the Martians have returned to try and retrieve weapons abandoned in 1938

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A vengeful voodoo priestess ensnares Arcane in a voodoo curse as revenge for his enslavement of Jim Kipp who had once saved a cousin of hers from drowning Alec helps Graham and a kindly voodoo priest save Arcane from certain dea

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A self-proclaimed psychic comes to the swamp in search of Alec Holland with a message from his dead wife Linda She also reveals that Jim is still alive and will be heard from soon

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The Alphans encounter the Voyager space probe that has been wandering the cosmos propelled by the Queller drive- a faulty engine system Following the probe is a fleet of alien ships from a world devastated by the drive

programme.title: King Kong Vs Godzilla
programme.desc: Godzilla a prehistoric monster emerges from hibernation while a pharmaceutical company seeks publicity by bringing in another monster When the two battle it out death and destruction follow

programme.title: The Dukes Hazzard
programme.desc: Boss gets Uncle Jesse to enter a contest for a new type of fossil fuel saying that moonshine is the perfect way to cut down on pollution However Boss has more up his sleeve He plans to tip off the authorities and once Jesse is arrested take credit for the idea himself

programme.title: Hercules 213
programme.desc: Hercules 213

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Augur is recruited by a Taelon weapons project but the others are worried about his involvement When the project is launched earlier than originally planned to fight a Jiridian fleet the Earth is in danger

programme.title: The Streerts of San Francisco
programme.desc: A narcotics cop driven over the edge laces a batch of cocaine with cyanide and sets it loose on the streets

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Rogosh is an operative for a country hostile to the United States When he strikes he typically leaves dozens if not hundreds of bodies in his wake Rogosh has been spotted in Los Angeles But he will not crack under normal interrogation methods Briggs comes up with an unusual plan The IMF stages an accident where pedestrian Rogosh is struck by a car When he awakes he appears to be in a prison in his home country -- three years later

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon have less than two hours to find the dog that bit a little girl five days earlier Normally treatment consists of serum injections followed by vaccine inoculations but in this case the girl is highly allergic to the anti-rabies serum and it could kill her

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Frank Barker wants Joe to help him get a firearms license for the Fielder Militia The LAPD knows that the militias weapons are stolen from the Army so they have Joe string Barker along until they can arrest him and grab the weapons

programme.title: The Fugitive S01E25
programme.desc: The Fugitive S01E25

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: When a sunken Barkley riverboat is finally found its cargo of gold is missing and the late family patriarch is suspected to have stolen it

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne and his co-worker Smitty worried about smoke signals decide to hide on a high area but find an outlaw gang already there When the Shoshone attack a stage the group rescues the driver and woman passenger but are now trapped

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Bleav in Bengals
programme.desc: Solomon Wilcots hits the mics to talk Bengals football. After covering the field for the 'Who Dey?' nation

programme.title: Bleav In Commanders
programme.desc: Welcome to the Bleav in Commanders show hosted by former Washington WR Anthony Armstrong and Scott Jackson .We are proud to be a part of the Bleav Podcast Network! We provide insight on the Washington Commanders to the best fan base in the NFL! All content is for the fans, and by the fans. LET’S GO WASHINGTON!

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: Bleav in Giants
programme.desc: The broadcast team of commentator Bob Papa and New York Giants legend Carl Banks bring you weekly analysis on your New York Giants.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Keene and his dog Duke have been transported to Video Land and asked to help defeat Mother Brain After Princess Lana is kidnapped Kevin and his video game companions Mega-Man Kid Icarus and Simon Belmont have to work together to save her or else Mother Brain just might be able to take over Video Land and rule forever

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain makes a discovery that Kevin isnt very good at the Bayou Billy video game So she sets a trap to lure him into Bayouland

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
